micro_rules: Emit lowercase service/value member tokens after the receiver dot.
Never invent service names outside the provided service_list_snippet.

rows.command_eng: Switch the TV to channel 7 and switch to channel 11 after 1 hour.
rows.output: {"name":"Switch the TV to channel 7 and switch to channel 11 after 1 hour","cron":"","period":0,"code":"delay(1 HOUR); (#Television).switch_on(); (#Television).television_setchannel(7); delay(1 HOUR); (#Television).television_setchannel(11)"}

rows.command_eng: Set the air conditioner to cool mode and switch to auto mode after 30 minutes.
rows.output: {"name":"Set the air conditioner to cool mode and switch to auto mode after 30 minutes","cron":"","period":0,"code":"delay(1800).(#AirConditioner).airconditioner_setairconditionermode(\"cool\").delay(1800).(#AirConditioner).airconditioner_setairconditionermode(\"auto\")"}

rows.command_eng: Set the air purifier to auto mode and switch to sleep mode after 2 hours.
rows.output: {"name":"Set Air Purifier Mode and Switch to Sleep Mode","cron":"","period":0,"code":"delay(2 HOURS); (#AirPurifier).airpurifier_setairpurifiermode(\"auto\"); delay(2 HOURS); (#AirPurifier).airpurifier_setairpurifiermode(\"sleep\")"}

rows.command_eng: Set the air conditioner temperature to 24 degrees and change it to 26 degrees after 1 hour.
